SERVICE_1_DESC: Professional haircut with fade, texturing, and styling options
SERVICE_3_DESC: Haircuts for kids — 'Who says we're just for grown men?'

ABOUT_TEXT: Your go-to barbershop in the South delivering quality grooming service since 2015. Stay Suave all day! Modern traditional barbershop with air-conditioned cozy atmosphere, leather seats, and fun atmosphere with showmanship from barbers.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: Had my first haircut in forever. And never regret that I chose Suave to do it. You can see that they are really passionate on what their doing. Expertise, fun and just enough showmanship is what I saw. Will definitely go back for another haircut.
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: I had a great experience at Suave Haircut in Sucat. The place is air-conditioned and has a cozy atmosphere, making it comfortable to stay while getting a haircut.
CONTACT_ADDRESS: 1709 Dr Arcadio Santos Ave, San Isidro, Parañaque, 1700 Metro Manila, Philippines
